name: Bacon-Asparagus Quiche
recipeIngredient: 10 ounces frozen (or 1 pound fresh), asparagus, cut to 1-inch lengths
1 cup Swiss cheese, cut into 1/4-inch cubes
1 cup whipping cream, half and half or undiluted evaporated milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain and crumble the bacon. Set aside.
2. Brush mustard evenly over the bottom and sides of the pastry shell.
3. Bake the shell at 375 degrees for 15 minutes or until firm, but not completely browned.
4. Sprinkle the baked crust with the bacon and arrange the cooked, drained asparagus over it.
5. Sprinkle with half the Swiss cheese.
6. In a bowl, mix eggs, cream, salt, pepper, tarragon, and savory leaves.
7. Pour the mixture over the contents of the shell.
8. Top with the remaining Swiss cheese.
9. Return to oven and bake about 25 to 35 minutes or until the quiche is set in the center (a butter knife inserted into the center comes out clean).
